revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template is meant for articles that incorporate text from pre-{{Not-PD-US-expired-min-year}} documents not better covered by other [[:Category:Attribution templates|attribution templates]]. Title and year of publication are mandatory. The author parameter is optional. *{{PD-old-text|title=|year=|author=}} {{para|title}} can also be given as {{para|work}}. And {{para|year}} can also be given as {{para|date}}. ===Examples=== *{{PD-old-text|title=An Out of Copyright Book|year=1900}} {{PD-old-text|title=An Out of Copyright Book|year=1900}}
*{{PD-old-text|title=An Out of Copyright Book|author=Jane Doe|year=1900}} {{PD-old-text|title=An Out of Copyright Book|year=1900|author=Jane Doe}} If no {{para|title}} is given, the page will be placed in [[:Category:Pages using PD-old-text with no text title]], and red warning text will appear. === See also === *[[Wikipedia:Public domain]] *[[:Category:Attribution templates]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Attribution templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template is meant for articles that incorporate text from pre-{{Not-PD-US-expired-min-year}} documents not better covered by other [[:Category:Attribution templates|attribution templates]]. Title and year of publication are mandatory. The author parameter is optional. *{{PD-old-text|title=|year=|author=}} {{para|title}} can also be given as {{para|work}}. And {{para|year}} can also be given as {{para|date}}. ===Examples=== *{{PD-old-text|title=An Out of Copyright Book|year=1900}} {{PD-old-text|title=An Out of Copyright Book|year=1900}}
*{{PD-old-text|title=An Out of Copyright Book|author=Jane Doe|year=1900}} {{PD-old-text|title=An Out of Copyright Book|year=1900|author=Jane Doe}} If no {{para|title}} is given, the page will be placed in [[:Category:Pages using PD-old-text with no text title]], and red warning text will appear. === See also === *[[Wikipedia:Public domain]] *[[:Category:Attribution templates]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Attribution templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template is meant for articles that incorporate text from pre-{{Not-PD-US-expired-min-year}} documents not better covered by other [[:Category:Attribution templates|attribution templates]]. Title and year of publication are mandatory. The author parameter is optional. *{{PD-old-text|title=|year=|author=}} {{para|title}} can also be given as {{para|work}}. And {{para|year}} can also be given as {{para|date}}. ===Examples=== *{{PD-old-text|title=An Out of Copyright Book|year=1900}} {{PD-old-text|title=An Out of Copyright Book|year=1900}}
*{{PD-old-text|title=An Out of Copyright Book|author=Jane Doe|year=1900}} {{PD-old-text|title=An Out of Copyright Book|year=1900|author=Jane Doe}} If no {{para|title}} is given, the page will be placed in [[:Category:Pages using PD-old-text with no text title]], and red warning text will appear. === See also === *[[Wikipedia:Public domain]] *[[:Category:Attribution templates]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Attribution templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template is meant for articles that incorporate text from pre-{{Not-PD-US-expired-min-year}} documents not better covered by other [[:Category:Attribution templates|attribution templates]]. Title and year of publication are mandatory. The author parameter is optional. *{{PD-old-text|title=|year=|author=}} {{para|title}} can also be given as {{para|work}}. And {{para|year}} can also be given as {{para|date}}. ===Examples=== *{{PD-old-text|title=An Out of Copyright Book|year=1900}} {{PD-old-text|title=An Out of Copyright Book|year=1900}}
*{{PD-old-text|title=An Out of Copyright Book|author=Jane Doe|year=1900}} {{PD-old-text|title=An Out of Copyright Book|year=1900|author=Jane Doe}} If no {{para|title}} is given, the page will be placed in [[:Category:Pages using PD-old-text with no text title]], and red warning text will appear. === See also === *[[Wikipedia:Public domain]] *[[:Category:Attribution templates]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Attribution templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23524127410|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template is meant for articles that incorporate text from pre-{{Not-PD-US-expired-min-year}} documents not better covered by other [[:Category:Attribution templates|attribution templates]]. Title and year of publication are mandatory. The author parameter is optional. *{{PD-old-text|title=|year=|author=}} {{para|title}} can also be given as {{para|work}}. And {{para|year}} can also be given as {{para|date}}. ===Examples=== *{{PD-old-text|title=An Out of Copyright Book|year=1900}} {{PD-old-text|title=An Out of Copyright Book|year=1900}}
*{{PD-old-text|title=An Out of Copyright Book|author=Jane Doe|year=1900}} {{PD-old-text|title=An Out of Copyright Book|year=1900|author=Jane Doe}} If no {{para|title}} is given, the page will be placed in [[:Category:Pages using PD-old-text with no text title]], and red warning text will appear. === See also === *[[Wikipedia:Public domain]] *[[:Category:Attribution templates]] {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Attribution templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template is meant for articles that incorporate text from pre-{{Not-PD-US-expired-min-year}} documents not better covered by other [[:Category:Attribution templates|attribution templates]]. Title and year of publication are mandatory. The author parameter is optional. *{{PD-old-text|title=|year=|author=}} {{para|title}} can also be given as {{para|work}}. And {{para|year}} can also be given as {{para|date}}. ===Examples=== *{{PD-old-text|title=An Out of Copyright Book|year=1900}} {{PD-old-text|title=An Out of Copyright Book|year=1900}}
*{{PD-old-text|title=An Out of Copyright Book|author=Jane Doe|year=1900}} {{PD-old-text|title=An Out of Copyright Book|year=1900|author=Jane Doe}} If no {{para|title}} is given, the page will be placed in [[:Category:Pages using PD-old-text with no text title]], and red warning text will appear. === See also === *[[Wikipedia:Public domain]] *[[:Category:Attribution templates]] {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Attribution templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
